samples.text: Wearing a coat keeps you warm in winter. Is this expected based on common sense?
A coat keeps a person warm during winter. Does this match everyday common sense?
Donning a jacket keeps you warm in the cold season. Is this expected based on common sense?
Insulation retains body heat. A coat insulates, so it keeps you warm. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
Wearing a coat keeps you warm in winter. A blue car is parked outside. Is this expected based on common sense?
